cssSize.description: A CSS size value like 16px or 1rem

primary.description: The main shade of this color

lighter.description: Very light shade for subtle highlights

dark.description: Dark shade for text on colored backgrounds

description: DeckWing Design System — all files in src/config/design/ are validated against this schema

colors.description: colors.json — the brand color palette. Bot Teal (50%), Ops Indigo (15%), Trigger Amber (10%), Alert Coral (5%), Cloud Gray (20%)

teal.description: Bot Teal — primary brand color, buttons, accents

indigo.description: Ops Indigo — dark backgrounds, app chrome

amber.description: Trigger Amber — highlights, calls to action

coral.description: Alert Coral — errors, warnings, destructive actions

gray.description: Cloud Gray — neutral text, borders, subtle backgrounds

icons.description: icons.json — available Lucide icons organized by category

slideIcons.description: Icons available in slides, grouped by category. Names are case-sensitive Lucide icon names.

iconSizes.description: Default pixel sizes for icons in different contexts

images.description: images.json — logo paths and display settings
